response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified three distinct characters in the intro (Subaru, Polka, Noel). 2. Observed a transition at 03:34 to a solo musical performance by Otonose Kanade. 3. Captured on-screen text for the song: Title "Beautiful", Lyrics by "超哲学 (Chotetsugaku)", Composed by "菅谷豊 (Yutaka Sugaya)" and "超哲学 (Chotetsugaku)". 4. Attempted a search for "Beautiful Otonose Kanade Japanese and English lyrics". The search results confirm Otonose Kanade is a Hololive VTuber but do not return the specific lyrics for this song, which appears to be a new or original piece debuted at her 2025 birthday concert. Thus, lyrics are marked as null.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue segment between Hololive VTubers Oozora Subaru, Omaru Polka, and Shirogane Noel, followed by a solo musical performance of the song "Beautiful" by Otonose Kanade.

scenes.description: Dialogue segment featuring VTubers Oozora Subaru, Omaru Polka, and Shirogane Noel.
Otonose Kanade performs the song "Beautiful" on stage. Song credits appear on-screen at 03:48.
scenes.original_artist: 超哲学 (Chotetsugaku) / 菅谷豊 (Yutaka Sugaya)
